title: Neurology imaging result review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports a traceable record of review, action, responsibility, referral and handover for pathology and radiology results.
assessment.rationale: Supports traceable review, action, responsibility and handover for radiology results for neurological imaging result review; no decision is generated.

source.title: Management of Investigation Results in the Emergency Department
source.jurisdiction: United Kingdom emergency medicine; requires UAE governance and pathway adaptation
source.population: Adults and children whose pathology or radiology investigations were requested or reviewed by an emergency department.
source.setting: Emergency department result review, communication, handover and follow-up governance.
source.exclusions: Exact for recording which test was requested, the result or report review, action taken, responsibility, referral or handover and patient communication. It does not interpret a result or generate management.
